description: Create a 2D interactive car racing game where the camera dynamically follows the car's movement. The game features a Sky Racer controller with third-person camera following system positioned at [0, 16, 25] behind the car. As the car moves left and right on the highway in response to player swipe controls, the camera automatically adjusts its position to maintain a consistent following view, providing an immersive racing experience by keeping the car centered in the frame while preserving depth perception through proper camera positioning.
